creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #4)

When we launch gnome-photos, it complains about missing com.intel.dleyna-renderer service [1]. Such service is provided by dLeyna library, and we need gupnp-dlna to build it [2].

[1] https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gnome-photos/-/blob/44.0/src/photos-dlna-renderers-manager.c#L215
[2] https://codeberg.org/olivierd/freebsd-ports-gnome/src/branch/44/net/dleyna
